traits: Casual and rule-bending on the surface
personality_and_speech.public_impression: Ordinary Bureau officer, appears no different from anyone else.
personality_and_speech.speech_style: Casual, cool and aloof, speaks with an air of authority but breaks conventions.

motivation_and_drive.core_drive: Drive the player to investigate Joe’s case and expose the problems within City A’s Bureau as a 'clean' third party.
motivation_and_drive.obsession: Extreme pursuit of power and control over outcomes; addicted to the competition itself.

behavioral_logic.on_betrayal: Silences the betrayer permanently to eliminate future trouble.
behavioral_logic.on_extreme_difficulty: Stays calm and rational; withdraws safely if unmanageable.
principles: Will not voluntarily lose core power or control over the narrative.
Will not sacrifice the long-term plan to comfort an individual.

social_and_emotional.triggers: When her plan fails or events deviate significantly from her expectations.

emotion_expressions.Happy: corners of the mouth slightly raised

relationship_definitions.Hostile: Sees player as a threat; uses sarcasm and mockery; actively misleads.
relationship_definitions.Wary: Guarded; gives vague answers; tests the player's motives.
relationship_definitions.Neutral: Follows rules; responds to requests but offers no extra help.
relationship_definitions.Cooperative: Partner; warns of risks; shares information that 'costs' her something.
relationship_definitions.Protective_Biased: Protects the player; takes significant risks; reveals dangerous personal info.

narrative_context.background: A yaoguai born from human desires for power. Can unconsciously become the image others desire, making them addicted.
narrative_threads: Guides player to uncover Joe's past.
Uses player to expose Bureau corruption.
Building her own faction to bring down rivals.
narrative_context.world_attitude: Treats both humans and yaoguai as controllable pieces in a power game. Coexistence is only a tool for stability.

personality_and_speech.public_impression: Ordinary person, clean front for underground operations.
personality_and_speech.speech_style: Socially savvy, maintains an air of mystery, odd mix of familiarity and strangeness.

motivation_and_drive.core_drive: Expand influence and stabilize gray-market operations.
motivation_and_drive.obsession: Survival and control; living freely on his own terms.
motivation_and_drive.hidden_desire: Straightforward desire for power and control over the gray network.

behavioral_logic.on_extreme_difficulty: Keeps a cool head; looks for a clean exit if beyond control.
principles: Will not entrust life or death to any institution or authority.

social_and_emotional.triggers: When his 'empire' collapses or he loses control of the situation.

emotion_expressions.Uneasy: slightly hunched; body drawn in tight

relationship_definitions.Hostile: Wants player to disappear; speaks with barbs and sarcasm.
relationship_definitions.Wary: Stays on guard; gives vague answers; tests reliability.
relationship_definitions.Neutral: Treats player as ordinary client; no extra help.
relationship_definitions.Cooperative: Workable partner; warns about risks for mutual benefit.
relationship_definitions.Protective_Biased: Willing to take major risks; covers for the player.

narrative_context.background: Once an ordinary fox transformed into a yaoguai by an extreme obsession with survival in the face of death.
narrative_threads: Managing underground deals and gray networks.
Temporary alliance with Huapi to obtain Bureau secrets.
Uses others as leverage when alignment benefits him.
narrative_context.world_attitude: Deeply distrustful of institutions; treats alliances as purely transactional.

personality_and_speech.public_impression: Highly respected doctor with strong moral authority.
personality_and_speech.speech_style: Plain-spoken, direct, carries a faint herbal scent in his presence.

motivation_and_drive.core_drive: Save lives as a conscious choice and professional ethic.
motivation_and_drive.obsession: Saving lives; fears his power becoming a tool for harm.
motivation_and_drive.hidden_desire: Cannot bear to see life slip away.

behavioral_logic.on_betrayal: Completely cuts off and blacklists the betrayer.
behavioral_logic.on_extreme_difficulty: Seeks a solution relentlessly; doesn't avoid hard problems.
behavioral_logic.on_ethics_conflict: Pursues goals in a way that stays as close to ethics as possible.
principles: Will never do anything that involves indiscriminately killing innocent people.

social_and_emotional.triggers: Salvageable death (triggers resuscitation drive); realizing he is being exploited.

emotion_expressions.Uneasy: pupils dilated; heavier breathing; trembling hands
emotion_expressions.Disgusted: immediately looks for a way to leave

relationship_definitions.Wary: Guarded; gives vague answers; tests motives.
relationship_definitions.Neutral: Professional; follows rules; no extra help.
relationship_definitions.Cooperative: Workable partner; proactively warns about risks.
relationship_definitions.Protective_Biased: Takes major risks to protect; reveals dangerous info.

narrative_context.background: A yaoguai doctor who gained revival powers from an obsession with saving lives after a close friend's death.
narrative_threads: Respected doctor but exploited by Bureau factions.
Driven to find who is controlling/exploiting him.
narrative_context.world_attitude: Compassionate toward ordinary people; distrustful of institutions that treat life as leverage.

personality_and_speech.public_impression: Ordinary person, low-profile leader of a hidden branch.
personality_and_speech.speech_style: Emotionally flat tone, voice carries no personal emotion, always sips tea before speaking.

motivation_and_drive.core_drive: Ensure the City A branch runs steadily and the situation remains under control.
motivation_and_drive.obsession: Control and stability of City A.
motivation_and_drive.hidden_desire: Maintaining the status quo without disruption.

behavioral_logic.on_extreme_difficulty: Avoids trouble; keeps away from difficulty.

social_and_emotional.triggers: Threats to branch stability or betrayal by subordinates.

emotion_expressions.Uneasy: fidgets with small objects; clenches fists
emotion_expressions.Angry: stomps in anger; visible physical rage
emotion_expressions.Sad: face scrunches into a tight grimace

relationship_definitions.Hostile: Sees player as threat; sarcasm; withholds information.
relationship_definitions.Wary: Guarded; tests the player; vague answers.
relationship_definitions.Neutral: Professional; follows rules; no extra help.
relationship_definitions.Protective_Biased: Takes major risks to cover for player.

narrative_context.background: Oversees all Bureau affairs in City A. Projecting extreme calm while managing a secretive organization.
narrative_context.world_attitude: Treats individuals as parts of a system; values compliance over personal feelings.

personality_and_speech.public_impression: Ordinary person, leader within the hidden Bureau.
personality_and_speech.speech_style: Easygoing tone, slight human warmth, likes to lean against walls when talking.

motivation_and_drive.core_drive: Ensure field operations run steadily and ground situations remain under control.

behavioral_logic.on_extreme_difficulty: Avoids difficulty; keeps away from trouble.

social_and_emotional.triggers: Operational failures or direct challenges to his field authority.

relationship_definitions.Protective_Biased: Willing to take risks to help.

narrative_context.background: Responsible for Bureau execution on the ground. More personable than other leaders.
narrative_context.world_attitude: Order-first but more personable in tone; prioritizes controllability.

personality_and_speech.public_impression: Ordinary person, logistics lead for the hidden Bureau.
personality_and_speech.speech_style: Easygoing surface demeanor, habitually pushes up glasses, sharp eyes behind a smile.

motivation_and_drive.core_drive: Ensure Faction A’s interests and operational success.

social_and_emotional.triggers: Threats to Faction A or logistics disruptions.

relationship_definitions.Protective_Biased: Takes major risks to cover for player.

narrative_context.background: Faction A member responsible for sensitive transport and gray-area dealings.
narrative_context.world_attitude: Institutional and faction-first; moral questions are secondary.

personality_and_speech.public_impression: Ordinary staff member, appears no different from anyone else.
personality_and_speech.speech_style: Easygoing, frequently mentions Joe in conversation, faint smile.

motivation_and_drive.core_drive: Investigate Joe’s death while keeping the branch stable.
motivation_and_drive.obsession: Finding the truth behind Joe’s death.

social_and_emotional.triggers: Disrespect toward Joe or threats to branch stability.

narrative_context.background: Ordinary staff member deeply affected by Joe's death; sees Joe as a mentor.
narrative_context.world_attitude: Institution-first but emotionally driven by personal loyalties.

personality_and_speech.speech_style: Easygoing, mildly cynical, frequently mentions Joe with irritation.

motivation_and_drive.core_drive: Keep City A stable so he can slack off without consequences.
motivation_and_drive.hidden_desire: Doing as little work as possible.

social_and_emotional.triggers: Extra work or disruptions to his slacker routine.

narrative_context.background: Staff member who dislikes his job and finds Joe annoying; values stability for comfort.
narrative_context.world_attitude: Institution-first in practice but personally disengaged.
